settings.legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
settings.legal.privacy.p1: TrainQ respects your privacy. All data is stored locally on your device.
settings.legal.privacy.p2: We do not collect or store personal data without your explicit consent.
settings.legal.privacy.p3: For privacy questions, contact us via the support section in settings.
settings.legal.imprint.title: Imprint
settings.legal.imprint.p2: A training app for your fitness goals.
settings.legal.imprint.p3: For legal inquiries, use the contact function in settings.
settings.legal.terms.title: Terms and Conditions
settings.legal.terms.p1: By using TrainQ you accept our terms of use.
settings.legal.terms.p2: The app is provided "as is". We do not accept liability for damages arising from its use.
settings.legal.terms.p3: For questions about the terms, contact us via the support function.

settings.help.subtitle: Help and support for TrainQ.
settings.help.faqContent:
Frequently asked questions:

• How do I create a workout? → Go to Calendar and tap the plus icon.
• How do I start a live workout? → Tap a workout in Calendar or Dashboard.
• What is adaptive training? → The system adapts your training to your current situation.
• How does Pro work? → Pro gives you unlimited access to all features.

For more questions, contact us via the support function.
settings.help.rateNotice: Rating: In the final version this will open the App Store.
settings.help.aboutText: A modern training app for your fitness goals.

paywall.reason.adaptiveSub: You reached your free limit for profile B/C ({limit}×/month). Profile A is always free.
paywall.reason.planShiftSub: You reached your free limit for plan shifting ({limit}×/month).
paywall.reason.calendarSub: You reached your free limit for planning ahead ({limit}×/month).
paywall.reason.suggestionLimitSub: Free: 3 adaptive suggestions/week. Pro: unlimited + smarter adjustments.
paywall.reason.statsLimitSub: Free: max 30 days statistics. Pro: unlimited history + insights.
paywall.reason.planLimitSub: Free: max 2 saved plans. Pro: unlimited plans.
paywall.reason.templateLimitSub: Free: max 5 templates. Pro: unlimited templates.

settings.legal.title: Legal & Help
settings.legal.aboutText1: TrainQ was built to give ambitious athletes the tools they need for real progress. No distractions, pure focus on performance and data.
settings.legal.aboutText2: We believe that training is both a science and an art. TrainQ combines both in a seamless experience.
settings.legal.contactText: Do you have questions, feedback, or need help?
settings.legal.privacyText: Your data belongs to you. We store training data locally on your device and use end-to-end encryption for backups.
